summary: Completed testing of Iteration 15 - Public Landing Page. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend landing page tests passed. The new LandingPage renders correctly at / for unauthenticated users with all required sections: hero, philosophy, features (9 cards), testimonials (carousel with prev/next), how-it-works (4 steps), final CTA, and footer. /login and /about routes still work correctly. Sign In buttons redirect to Emergent Auth.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx: Well-structured 437-line component with proper data-testid attributes
IntersectionObserver used for scroll-triggered feature card animations
Testimonials auto-rotate every 6 seconds with manual prev/next controls
All images from Unsplash/Pexels CDN load correctly
Proper responsive design with sm/lg breakpoints
Gold (#D4AF37) accent color provides good contrast on dark (#050814) background
seed_data_creation: None - landing page is purely frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 added a public landing page at / for unauthenticated users. Key data-testids: landing-page, hero-section, hero-cta-btn, nav-sign-in-btn, philosophy-section, features-section, testimonials-section, testimonial-prev, testimonial-next, how-it-works-section, final-cta-btn, landing-footer. The /login route still shows LoginPage. /about still shows AboutPage. All authenticated routes (/dashboard, /courses, etc.) work as before. No new backend endpoints were added.
